docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $437.08 FILED BY PHELPS, MILTON AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, CHRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $25.00 SERVED MAY-22-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, CHRIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MILTON PHELPS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRIS AYALA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHELPS, MILTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYALA, CHRIS $437.08 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $492.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, CHRIS
